questions.question: Choose the separable phrasal verb: Please {a1} the radio before the call.
Choose the inseparable phrasal verb: She {a1} her younger brother every afternoon.
Choose the correct noun-object position: He {a1} before going outside.
Choose the correct separated form: She {a1} after class.
Choose the correct pronoun placement: The light was too bright, so I {a1}.

Avoid the split-object mistake: His aunt {a1} during the trip.
Choose the correct pronoun placement: I borrowed the pen and {a1} later.
Choose the inseparable phrasal verb: I {a1} an old friend at the station.
